---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new chart, metric, or dashboard page
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Idea
A clear description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 🎯 Which page would this belong to?
- [ ] Page 1 – Executive Overview
- [ ] Page 2 – Team Performance
- [ ] Page 3 – Venue Insights
- [ ] Page 4 – Trends & Strategic Insights
- [ ] New page

## 📊 What data would it use?
Describe the metrics, columns, or dataset needed.

## 🖼️ Mockup / Reference
Any sketches, similar dashboards, or reference charts?

## ✅ Why would this be valuable?
What insight does this unlock?
